chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C. P. No.D — 2580 of 2019. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE[S] 20.04.2022. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar A.A.G. Sindh. The petitioners were appointed for a period of 89 days which was over and in consequence whereof this petition was filed with a prayer that the respondents be directed to extend the contract period and then they be regularized. Petitioners could not exhaust the remedy under Article 199 for a contractual obligation and that too when the contractual period is over and its extension is being asked and further for the regularization of the services once the contract is extended. The petition although in view of the above facts and circumstances is not maintainable but since the petitioners’ counsel is not in attendance we dismiss it for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE A.
